overview.description: AI-powered financial data analytics — NLP platform converting unstructured financial content into machine-readable intelligence for hedge funds, banks, and asset managers
overview.description_long: RavenPack is the leading provider of big data analytics for financial services, founded in 2003 in Marbella, Spain. The company converts vast amounts of unstructured information — news articles, regulatory filings, transcripts, earnings calls — into decision-ready insights. It serves approximately 70% of the world's top-performing hedge funds and major institutional investors globally. RavenPack offers two main products: RavenPack Edge (curated datasets and pre-built factors for quantitative and systematic investment workflows) and Bigdata.com (an AI-native research assistant platform for financial analysis using RAG and vector search). In 2024, RavenPack raised a $20M Series B led by GP Bullhound to accelerate its AI platform expansion and secured a strategic investment from FT Ventures (Financial Times).

history.origin_story: Founded in 2003 in Marbella, Spain by Armando Gonzalez, a technology entrepreneur and expert in applied AI for financial services. Named after Norse mythology — Odin's ravens that gather information from across the world.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Marbella, Spain by Armando Gonzalez
Core team including CTO Jason Cornez, COO Tania Calvo, and CDO Kevin Crosbie joined at founding
Peter Hafez joined as Chief Data Scientist; pioneered applied news analytics for institutional finance
Raised $20M Series B led by GP Bullhound and EIB Group to launch Bigdata.com
Secured strategic investment from FT Ventures (Financial Times) and integrated FT premium content into Bigdata.com

notable_people.name: Peter Hafez
notable_people.note: Pioneer in applied news analytics for finance; previously at S&P, Credit Suisse, Saxo Bank; guest lecturer at London Business School and NYU Courant

open_roles.title: Senior ML Engineer - Search & LLM Ops

partnerships: Financial Times (FT Ventures investment + content integration)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: RavenPack has 20+ years of proprietary curated financial data and domain expertise, serving 70% of top hedge funds. However, LLMs (Bloomberg Terminal AI, Perplexity Finance, GPT-4 with browsing) are increasingly capable of real-time financial text analysis. Their moat is data provenance, reliability standards, and institutional integration — not the NLP itself.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Financial data analytics is a well-established, multi-billion dollar market with proven institutional demand. RavenPack has a 20-year track record and blue-chip client base including ~70% of the world's top-performing hedge funds, providing strong PMF and pricing power.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Well-funded with $35M total including 2024 Series B led by GP Bullhound and strategic investment from Financial Times (FT Ventures). Strong institutional investor base and established revenue-generating client roster spanning global hedge funds and banks.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Established market position and 20-year institutional relationships buffer against AGI commoditization, but competition from Bloomberg, Refinitiv, and AI-native challengers is intensifying. The proprietary financial data corpus and workflow integrations provide a medium-term moat.

metadata.notes: RavenPack's primary offices are Marbella (Spain, HQ) and New York (US). No confirmed Prague or Czech office was found during research. The company describes itself as having '200+ employees across the U.S. and Europe' — some may be Czech-based remote employees. Prague connection is unconfirmed; included in this catalog with source=other. Legal name: RavenPack, S.L. (Spanish entity). Total funding of $35M per Tracxn; $33.8M per PitchBook — slight discrepancy, used $35M as most cited figure.
